page_metadata.biotools__summary: R package for building and running automated end-to-end analysis workflows for a wide range of NGS applications such as RNA-Seq, ChIP-Seq, VAR-Seq and Ribo-Seq. Important features include a uniform workflow interface across them, automated report generation, and support for running both R and command-line software, such as NGS aligners or peak/variant callers, on local computers or compute clusters.
